title: Pre-Op Evaluation & Goldman's Index
content: • Risk: The #1 predictor of surgical risk is CHF (Check EF; if <35%, no elective surgery). • Risk: MI within 6 months is the #2 predictor. Always check EKG/Stress test. • Dx: Absolute contraindications to surgery: Diabetic Coma and DKA.

title: The 5 W's of Post-Op Fever
content: • Dx: Day 1: Wind (Atelectasis). Tx: Incentive spirometry. • Dx: Day 3: Water (UTI). Tx: Remove catheter + Abx. • Dx: Day 5: Walking (DVT/PE). Tx: Heparin. • Dx: Day 7: Wound (Infection). Tx: Drainage + Abx. • Dx: Day 10+: Wonder drugs (Drug fever) or Deep abscess.

title: Pre-Op Medication Management
content: • Rule: Stop Aspirin & NSAIDs 2 weeks before surgery. • Rule: Stop Warfarin 5 days before (Target INR <1.5). • Rule: Take half the morning dose of Insulin on the day of surgery for diabetics.

title: Liver & Nutrition Assessment
content: • Risk: Poor nutrition if Albumin <3 or Weight loss >20%. • Risk: Severe liver failure markers: Bilirubin >2, PT >16, or Encephalopathy.
